notes: Generated by FLéX PokéAPI Data Builder.
Upload files into /data in the GitHub Pages repository.
Moves include IDs 1-354; 354 is Psycho Boost.

moves.name: pound
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: Pounds with fore­ legs or tail.

moves.flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: A powerful punch thrown very hard.

moves.flavor_text: Throws coins. Gets them back later.

moves.flavor_text: Stronger if the user's HP is low.

moves.name: conversion-2
moves.effect: Changes the user’s type to a random type either resistant or immune to the last move used against it.
moves.flavor_text: The user's type is made resistant.

moves.name: aeroblast
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

moves.name: cotton-spore
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Sharply reduces the foe's SPEED.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
moves.flavor_text: Stronger if the user's HP is low.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
moves.flavor_text: Cuts the PP of the foe's last move.

moves.name: powder-snow
moves.effect: Has a chance to freeze the target.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may cause freezing.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
moves.flavor_text: Foils attack that turn. It may fail.

moves.name: mach-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: A fast punch that lands first.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Sharply reduces the foe's SPEED.

moves.name: feint-attack
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that never misses.

moves.name: sweet-kiss
moves.effect: Confuses the target.
moves.flavor_text: A move that causes confusion.

moves.name: belly-drum
moves.effect: User pays half its max HP to max out its Attack.
moves.flavor_text: Reduces own HP to maximize ATTACK.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a chance to poison the target.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may poison the foe.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Reduces the foe's accuracy.

moves.name: octazooka
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may reduce accuracy.

moves.name: spikes
moves.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
moves.flavor_text: Hurts foes when they switch out.

moves.name: zap-cannon
moves.effect: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that always paralyzes.

moves.name: foresight
moves.effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
moves.flavor_text: Negates accuracy reduction moves.

moves.name: destiny-bond
moves.effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.
moves.flavor_text: The foe faints if the user does.

moves.name: perish-song
moves.effect: User and target both faint after three turns.
moves.flavor_text: Both user and foe faint in 3 turns.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An icy attack that lowers SPEED.

moves.name: detect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
moves.flavor_text: Evades attack that turn. It may fail.

moves.name: bone-rush
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that hits 2-5 times.

moves.name: lock-on
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.
moves.flavor_text: Ensures the next attack will hit.

moves.name: outrage
moves.effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
moves.flavor_text: Works 2-3 turns and confuses user.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Inflicts damage every turn.

moves.name: giga-drain
moves.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
moves.flavor_text: Steals 1/2 of the damage inflicted.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.
moves.flavor_text: Always leaves at least 1HP.

moves.name: charm
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Sharply lowers the foe's ATTACK.

moves.name: rollout
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks 5 turns with rising power.

moves.name: false-swipe
moves.effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.
moves.flavor_text: Leaves the foe with at least 1HP.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
moves.flavor_text: Causes confusion and raises ATTACK.

moves.name: milk-drink
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.flavor_text: Restores HP by 1/2 the max HP.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may cause paralysis.

moves.name: fury-cutter
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Successive hits raise power.

moves.name: steel-wing
moves.effect: Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Stiff wings strike the foe.

moves.name: mean-look
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
moves.flavor_text: Prevents fleeing or switching.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.
moves.flavor_text: Makes the opposite gender infatuated.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves. Only works if the user is sleeping.
moves.flavor_text: Randomly attacks while asleep.

moves.name: heal-bell
moves.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
moves.flavor_text: Eliminates all status problems.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that is based on loyalty.

moves.name: present
moves.effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.
moves.flavor_text: A bomb that may restore HP.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.
moves.flavor_text: An attack based on lack of loyalty.

moves.name: safeguard
moves.effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Prevents all status problems.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
moves.flavor_text: Adds user & foe's HPs. Shares total.

moves.name: sacred-fire
moves.effect: Has a chance to burn the target. Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may inflict a burn.

moves.name: magnitude
moves.effect: Power varies randomly from 10 to 150.
moves.flavor_text: A ground attack with random power.

moves.name: dynamic-punch
moves.effect: Has a chance to confuse the target.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that always confuses.

moves.name: megahorn
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: A powerful charge attack.

moves.name: dragon-breath
moves.effect: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.flavor_text: A strong breath attack.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
moves.flavor_text: Switches while keeping effects.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.
moves.flavor_text: Makes the foe re­ peat 2-6 times.

moves.name: pursuit
moves.effect: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.
moves.flavor_text: Heavily strikes switching POKéMON.

moves.name: rapid-spin
moves.effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
moves.flavor_text: A high-speed spinning attack.

moves.name: sweet-scent
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Reduces the foe's evasiveness.

moves.name: iron-tail
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may reduce DEFENSE.

moves.name: metal-claw
moves.effect: Has a chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may up user's ATTACK.

moves.name: vital-throw
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: A 2nd-strike move that never misses.

moves.name: morning-sun
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP. Affected by weather.
moves.flavor_text: Restores HP (varies by time).

moves.name: synthesis
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP. Affected by weather.
moves.flavor_text: Restores HP (varies by time).

moves.name: moonlight
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP. Affected by weather.
moves.flavor_text: Restores HP (varies by time).

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs. Power can range from 30 to 70.
moves.flavor_text: The power varies with the POKéMON.

moves.name: cross-chop
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

moves.name: twister
moves.effect: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.flavor_text: Whips up a tornado to attack.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Boosts the power of WATER- type moves for 5 turns.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Boosts fire-type moves for 5 turns.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPCL.DEF.

moves.name: mirror-coat
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
moves.flavor_text: Counters a SPCL. ATK. move double.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
moves.flavor_text: Copies the foe's stat changes.

moves.name: extreme-speed
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: A powerful first- strike move.

moves.name: ancient-power
moves.effect: Has a chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may raise all stats.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPCL.DEF.

moves.name: future-sight
moves.effect: Hits the target two turns later.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that hits on 3rd turn.

moves.name: rock-smash
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may lower DEFENSE.

moves.name: whirlpool
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.flavor_text: Traps the foe for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: beat-up
moves.effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.
moves.flavor_text: Party POKéMON join in the attack.

moves.name: fake-out
moves.effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle. Causes the target to flinch.
moves.flavor_text: A 1st-turn, 1st-strike move that causes flinching.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns. Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
moves.flavor_text: Causes an uproar for 2 to 5 turns and prevents sleep.

moves.name: stockpile
moves.effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
moves.flavor_text: Charges up power for up to 3 turns.

moves.name: spit-up
moves.effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
moves.flavor_text: Releases stockpiled power (the more the better).

moves.name: swallow
moves.effect: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.
moves.flavor_text: Absorbs stockpiled power and restores HP.

moves.name: heat-wave
moves.effect: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.flavor_text: Exhales a hot breath on the foe. May inflict a burn.

moves.name: hail
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.
moves.flavor_text: Summons a hailstorm that strikes every turn.

moves.name: torment
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
moves.flavor_text: Torments the foe and stops successive use of a move.

moves.name: flatter
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage and confuses the target.
moves.flavor_text: Confuses the foe, but raises its SP. ATK.

moves.name: will-o-wisp
moves.effect: Burns the target.
moves.flavor_text: Inflicts a burn on the foe with intense fire.

moves.name: memento
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages. User faints.
moves.flavor_text: The user faints and lowers the foe’s abilities.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.
moves.flavor_text: Boosts ATTACK when burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: focus-punch
moves.effect: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.
moves.flavor_text: A powerful loyalty attack. The user flinches if hit.

moves.name: smelling-salts
moves.effect: If the target is paralyzed, inflicts double damage and cures the paralysis.
moves.flavor_text: Powerful against paralyzed foes, but also heals them.

moves.name: follow-me
moves.effect: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
moves.flavor_text: Draws attention to make foes attack only the user.

moves.name: nature-power
moves.effect: Uses a move which depends upon the terrain.
moves.flavor_text: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage. User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.
moves.flavor_text: Charges power to boost the electric move used next.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
moves.flavor_text: Taunts the foe into only using attack moves.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.
moves.flavor_text: A move that boosts the power of the ally’s attack in a Double Battle.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.
moves.flavor_text: Tricks the foe into trading held items.

moves.name: role-play
moves.effect: Copies the target’s ability.
moves.flavor_text: Mimics the target and copies its special ability.

moves.name: wish
moves.effect: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
moves.flavor_text: A wish that restores HP. It takes time to work.

moves.name: assist
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses one of the trainer’s other Pokémon’s moves.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks randomly with one of the partner’s moves.

moves.name: ingrain
moves.effect: Prevents the user from leaving battle. User regains 1/16 of its max HP every turn.
moves.flavor_text: Lays roots that restore HP. The user can’t switch out.

moves.name: superpower
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
moves.flavor_text: Boosts strength sharply, but lowers abilities.

moves.name: magic-coat
moves.effect: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.
moves.flavor_text: Reflects special effects back to the attacker.

moves.name: recycle
moves.effect: User recovers the item it last used up.
moves.flavor_text: Recycles a used item for one more use.

moves.name: revenge
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that gains power if injured by the foe.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.
moves.flavor_text: Destroys barriers such as REFLECT and causes damage.

moves.name: yawn
moves.effect: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.
moves.flavor_text: Lulls the foe into yawning, then sleeping next turn.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.
moves.flavor_text: Knocks down the foe’s held item to prevent its use.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.
moves.flavor_text: Gains power if the user’s HP is lower than the foe’s HP.

moves.name: eruption
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
moves.flavor_text: The higher the user’s HP, the more damage caused.

moves.name: skill-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap abilities.
moves.flavor_text: The user swaps special abilities with the target.

moves.name: imprison
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.
moves.flavor_text: Prevents foes from using moves known by the user.

moves.name: refresh
moves.effect: Cleanses the user of a burn, paralysis, or poison.
moves.flavor_text: Heals poisoning, paralysis, or a burn.

moves.name: grudge
moves.effect: If the user faints this turn, the PP of the move that fainted it drops to 0.
moves.flavor_text: If the user faints, deletes the PP of the final move.

moves.name: snatch
moves.effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.
moves.flavor_text: Steals the effects of the move the foe uses next.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.
moves.flavor_text: An attack with effects that vary by location.

moves.name: dive
moves.effect: User dives underwater, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
moves.flavor_text: Dives underwater the first turn and strikes next turn.

moves.name: arm-thrust
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.flavor_text: Straight-arm punches that strike the foe 2 to 5 times.

moves.name: camouflage
moves.effect: User’s type changes to match the terrain.
moves.flavor_text: Alters the POKéMON’s type depending on the location.

moves.name: tail-glow
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by three stages.
moves.flavor_text: Flashes a light that sharply raises SP. ATK.

moves.name: luster-purge
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with a burst of light. May lower SP. DEF.

moves.name: mist-ball
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with a flurry of down. May lower SP. ATK.

moves.name: feather-dance
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Envelops the foe with down to sharply reduce ATTACK.

moves.name: teeter-dance
moves.effect: Confuses the target.
moves.flavor_text: Confuses all POKéMON on the scene.

moves.name: blaze-kick
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a chance to burn the target.
moves.flavor_text: A kick with a high critical- hit ratio. May cause a burn.

moves.name: mud-sport
moves.effect: Halves all Electric-type damage.
moves.flavor_text: Covers the user in mud to raise electrical resistance.

moves.name: ice-ball
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
moves.flavor_text: A 5-turn attack that gains power on successive hits.

moves.name: needle-arm
moves.effect: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with thorny arms. May cause flinching.

moves.name: slack-off
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.flavor_text: Slacks off and restores half the maximum HP.

moves.name: hyper-voice
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: A loud attack that uses sound waves to injure.

moves.name: poison-fang
moves.effect: Has a chance to badly poison the target.
moves.flavor_text: A sharp-fanged attack. May badly poison the foe.

moves.name: crush-claw
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Tears at the foe with sharp claws. May lower DEFENSE.

moves.name: blast-burn
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

moves.name: hydro-cannon
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

moves.name: meteor-mash
moves.effect: Has a chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Fires a meteor-like punch. May raise ATTACK.

moves.name: astonish
moves.effect: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.flavor_text: An attack that may shock the foe into flinching.

moves.name: weather-ball
moves.effect: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.
moves.flavor_text: The move’s type and power change with the weather.

moves.name: aromatherapy
moves.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
moves.flavor_text: Heals all status problems with a soothing scent.

moves.name: fake-tears
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Feigns crying to sharply lower the foe’s SP. DEF.

moves.name: air-cutter
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.flavor_text: Hacks with razorlike wind. High critical-hit ratio.

moves.name: overheat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
moves.flavor_text: Allows a full-power attack, but sharply lowers SP. ATK.

moves.name: odor-sleuth
moves.effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
moves.flavor_text: Negates the foe’s efforts to heighten evasiveness.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Stops the foe from moving with rocks and cuts SPEED.

moves.name: silver-wind
moves.effect: Has a chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: A powdery attack that may raise abilities.

moves.name: metal-sound
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Emits a horrible screech that sharply lowers SP. DEF.

moves.name: grass-whistle
moves.effect: Puts the target to sleep.
moves.flavor_text: Lulls the foe into sleep with a pleasant melody.

moves.name: tickle
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Makes the foe laugh to lower ATTACK and DEFENSE.

moves.name: cosmic-power
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Raises DEFENSE and SP. DEF with a mystic power.

moves.name: water-spout
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
moves.flavor_text: Inflicts more damage if the user’s HP is high.

moves.name: signal-beam
moves.effect: Has a chance to confuse the target.
moves.flavor_text: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

moves.name: shadow-punch
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: An unavoidable punch that is thrown from shadows.

moves.name: extrasensory
moves.effect: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with a peculiar power. May cause flinching.

moves.name: sky-uppercut
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Bounce and Fly users.
moves.flavor_text: An uppercut thrown as if leaping into the sky.

moves.name: sand-tomb
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.flavor_text: Traps and hurts the foe in quicksand for 2 to 5 turns.

moves.name: sheer-cold
moves.effect: Causes a one-hit KO.
moves.flavor_text: A chilling attack that causes fainting if it hits.

moves.name: muddy-water
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with muddy water. May lower accuracy.

moves.name: bullet-seed
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.flavor_text: Shoots 2 to 5 seeds in a row to strike the foe.

moves.name: aerial-ace
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: An extremely speedy and unavoidable attack.

moves.name: icicle-spear
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks the foe by firing 2 to 5 icicles in a row.

moves.name: iron-defense
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
moves.flavor_text: Hardens the body’s surface to sharply raise DEFENSE.

moves.name: block
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
moves.flavor_text: Blocks the foe’s way to prevent escape.

moves.name: howl
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Howls to raise the spirit and boosts ATTACK.

moves.name: dragon-claw
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.flavor_text: Slashes the foe with sharp claws.

moves.name: frenzy-plant
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

moves.name: bulk-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Bulks up the body to boost both ATTACK and DEFENSE.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
moves.flavor_text: Bounces up, then down the next turn. May paralyze.

moves.name: mud-shot
moves.effect: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Hurls mud at the foe and reduces SPEED.

moves.name: poison-tail
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a chance to poison the target.
moves.flavor_text: Has a high critical-hit ratio. May also poison.

moves.name: covet
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.
moves.flavor_text: Cutely begs to obtain an item held by the foe.

moves.name: volt-tackle
moves.effect: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.flavor_text: A life-risking tackle that slightly hurts the user.

moves.name: magical-leaf
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with a strange leaf that cannot be evaded.

moves.name: water-sport
moves.effect: Halves all Fire-type damage.
moves.flavor_text: The user becomes soaked to raise resistance to fire.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: Raises SP. ATK and SP. DEF by focusing the mind.

moves.name: leaf-blade
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.flavor_text: Slashes with a sharp leaf. High critical-hit ratio.

moves.name: dragon-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Speed by one stage.
moves.flavor_text: A mystical dance that ups ATTACK and SPEED.

moves.name: rock-blast
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.flavor_text: Hurls boulders at the foe 2 to 5 times in a row.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.
moves.flavor_text: A fast and unavoidable electric attack.

moves.name: water-pulse
moves.effect: Has a chance to confuse the target.
moves.flavor_text: Attacks with ultrasonic waves. May confuse the foe

moves.name: doom-desire
moves.effect: Hits the target two turns later.
moves.flavor_text: Summons strong sunlight to attack 2 turns later.

moves.name: psycho-boost
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
moves.flavor_text: Allows a full-power attack, but sharply lowers SP. ATK.
